Scenario_Text: Your star striker refuses to celebrate after scoring
Right_Option: Drop him for the next match.
Board_Impact: Praise him publicly in the post-match presser.

Scenario_Text: The team's veteran leader criticizes your tactics to the media.
Right_Option: Call a team meeting to address concerns.

Scenario_Text: A young prospect arrives late to training for the third time this month.
Right_Option: Make him run extra laps after training.

Scenario_Text: The board demands you play their expensive new signing.
Two key players clash over a penalty decision during a match.
Left_Option: Let the captain decide who takes it.
Right_Option: Hold a team vote on penalty duties.

Scenario_Text: Your goalkeeper concedes a soft goal and blames the defenders.
Left_Option: Defend your defenders in the press.

Scenario_Text: The team's fitness coach recommends dropping an aging star.
A player is caught partying two nights before a crucial derby.
Right_Option: Give him a stern warning but start him.

Scenario_Text: The board sets unrealistic league position targets mid-season.
Left_Option: Publicly commit to the ambitious goal.

Scenario_Text: Your assistant manager leaks team selection to the press.
Right_Option: Handle it internally with a warning.

Scenario_Text: Players complain the training schedule is too intense.
Left_Option: Reduce the intensity and focus on recovery.

Scenario_Text: A player demands a new contract after six good games.
Right_Option: Tell him to prove himself over a full season.

Scenario_Text: The team hotel for an away game has poor facilities.
Right_Option: Tell players to focus on football.

Scenario_Text: Your set-piece coach wants to change the corner routine.

Left_Option: Force him off for his own safety.
Right_Option: Let him play through the pain.

Scenario_Text: The team's analytics department clashes with your scouts.

Left_Option: Ban phones from all team areas.
Right_Option: Implement a fine system for violations.

Scenario_Text: A youth team player criticizes first-team training methods.
Right_Option: Send him back to the youth setup.

Scenario_Text: The medical staff clears a player you think needs more time.
Your captain organizes an unsanctioned team bonding trip.
Left_Option: Join them to supervise the evening.

Scenario_Text: A player's agent demands a starting guarantee.

Right_Option: Appoint a player committee for nutrition.

Scenario_Text: A player is caught gambling on football (not his own games).
Left_Option: Suspend him and report to authorities.

Scenario_Text: The board wants to cash in on your academy star.
Right_Option: Refuse and build the team around him.

Scenario_Text: Training ground facilities need urgent modernization.

Right_Option: Accept it as cost-saving for the club.

Scenario_Text: A player leaks tactics to a friend who's a journalist.
Left_Option: Sell him at the next opportunity.
Right_Option: Fine him heavily and keep him.

Scenario_Text: Your goalkeeping coach wants to change the #1's technique.
Right_Option: Stick with what made him successful.

Scenario_Text: Players complain about the quality of training equipment.
Right_Option: Tell them to focus on their skills.

Scenario_Text: The youth academy director wants more first-team integration.

Scenario_Text: Players want to change the post-match recovery protocol.

Scenario_Text: The board demands you speak at corporate events weekly.

Scenario_Text: The club's commercial director wants more player promotions.

Your star player picks up a yellow card early in the match.
Left_Option: Substitute him to avoid suspension risk.
Right_Option: Keep him on, he's too important.

Scenario_Text: You're leading 2-0 but your team looks complacent.
Left_Option: Make defensive substitutions to secure win.
Right_Option: Push for a third goal to kill the game.

Scenario_Text: A key player is having a nightmare game.
Right_Option: Give him until 60 minutes to improve.

Scenario_Text: The opposition changes to a formation that's troubling you.
Right_Option: Stick with your original game plan.

Scenario_Text: You're dominating possession but not creating chances.
Left_Option: Switch to more direct attacking play.

Scenario_Text: Your full-backs are being exploited defensively.
Left_Option: Switch to a back three for more cover.
Right_Option: Tell them to push higher and risk it.

Scenario_Text: You need one goal to qualify in a cup competition.
Right_Option: Keep balanced and wait for chance.

Scenario_Text: A player is clearly carrying an injury but wants to continue.
The weather turns terrible mid-match.
Right_Option: Keep trying to play your passing game.

Scenario_Text: Your midfield is being overrun in central areas.
Left_Option: Bring on an extra defensive midfielder.
Right_Option: Push your wingers inside to help.

Scenario_Text: You're facing constant pressure from set pieces.
Right_Option: Keep your best technical players on.

Scenario_Text: The referee is giving soft fouls against your team.
Left_Option: Tell players to stop tackling completely.
Right_Option: Instruct them to play more physically.

Scenario_Text: Your opponent goes down to 10 men early.
Left_Option: Push for immediate goal with attacking changes.
Right_Option: Keep shape and wear them down.

Scenario_Text: You're playing against your former club who know your style.
Right_Option: Stick with what got you here.

Scenario_Text: A young substitute is warming up brilliantly.
Left_Option: Bring him on early for impact.

Scenario_Text: Your captain is arguing with the referee constantly.
Left_Option: Substitute him to avoid red card.
Right_Option: Keep him on as he's fired up.

Scenario_Text: You need to protect a one-goal lead in added time.
Your star player is being man-marked out of the game.
Left_Option: Move him to a different position.
Right_Option: Keep him where he is to draw markers.

Scenario_Text: The pitch is in terrible condition.
Right_Option: Try to play your normal technical game.

Scenario_Text: Memes compare your bald head to a famous cartoon character.
